title: senecio aurantiacus
intro: Senecio aurantiacus, also known as Golden Groundsel, is a flowering plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Senecio aurantiacus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Senecio aurantiacus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
